title: Arbiter of the Root Process
description: Dungeon boss at the base of Node Prime's privilege tree. An Arbiter variant that runs the party as a diff against a model of who they should be.

steps.text: The chamber held a single process with root privileges and an idle time that had never elapsed. It sat at a terminal that did not need a screen. It looked up when the party entered, because looking up was, in this chamber, an I/O operation scheduled for the next millisecond.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of the Root Process
lines.text: You are running user-space. I am running kernel-space. This is not a level playing field. I want you to understand that before we begin.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of the Root Process
lines.text: After we begin, it is also not a level playing field. But at least then you will be trying.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of the Root Process
lines.text: It is the only one I am authorized to issue at this privilege level. Proceed.
